case_title: JESUS RAMIREZ FLORES VS. LUIS A RIVERA PIZARRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,046.77 FILED BY FLORES, JESUS RAMIREZ AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA PIZARRO, LUIS A ROSALES BARRERA, CARLOS ALEJANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, JESUS RAMIREZ AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA PIZARRO, LUIS A
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LUIS A RIVERA PIZARRO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-19-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY FLORES, JESUS RAMIREZ ROSALES BARRERA, CARLOS ALEJANDRO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT LUIS PAZARRO TO AUG-19-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT LUIS PAZARRO WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: #40.00) SERVED MAY-04-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES BARRERA, CARLOS ALEJANDRO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT LUIS PIZZARO WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT LUIS PIZZARO. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, JESUS RAMIREZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSALES BARRERA, CARLOS ALEJANDRO $3,046.77 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,136.77, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT CAUSED A CAR ACCIDENT WITH THIS AMOUNT OF DAMAGES TO HIS CAR. DEFENDANT PIZZARO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $400.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON SEP-15-2015 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
